title: InputAttribute
description: InputAttribute: Attribute providing information about an input parameter of a method.

Name.description: Name of the method parameter this attribute corresponds to.

Description.description: Description of the correspondent input parameter.

Classification.description: Classification of the correspondent input parameter, e.g. folder path, quantity etc. ClassificationAttribute: Attribute representing classification of method parameters and object properties, i.e. it tells that a given member is a folder path, quantity etc.

Exposure.description: Information whether the correspondent input parameter is meant to be shown in the UI or not. UIExposure: Setting to determine whether an element using this enum should be displayed on a User Interface (UI).

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
